positive: Stylized, minimalist graphic of a celestial fox spirit (Kitsune) silhouette. The fox is curled in a graceful, watchful pose, surrounded by stylized, neon-glow magical rings and crescent moons. Use a vibrant, retro-futuristic palette of deep indigo, electric cyan, and glowing coral pink. The design should have strong contrast and clean lines, suitable for a chest print on a t-shirt. Composition must be centered and balanced, ensuring clear edges for apparel printing. High detail, vector art quality, linocut influence, 80s vaporwave aesthetic, kawaii, magical realism.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, low resolution, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, out of focus, muddy colors, photo-realistic, photorealism
